phase3_findings.description: docs/DEVFLOW_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md:499 security bullet still attributes the review agent's progress comment/verdicts/approvals/rejections to the primary DEVFLOW_APP_ID App — stale after review posts moved to DevFlow-Reviewer
docs/cloud-setup.md:145-148 primary-App intro still lists the review agent's posts as primary-App user-visible posts, self-contradicting the DevFlow-Reviewer section added in the same file

fix_decisions.claim_text: review posts attributed to primary App in §15 threat-model bullet
fix_decisions.evidence: over-grade gate: NOT an over-grade — a buyer-facing threat-model doc stating review verdicts post under the primary App when they post as github-actions[bot]/DevFlow-Reviewer actively misleads an operator configuring only DEVFLOW_APP_ID; affirmed Important, fixed

fix_decisions.claim_text: primary-App intro lists review posts, contradicting the DevFlow-Reviewer section this diff added
fix_decisions.evidence: over-grade gate: NOT an over-grade — self-contradicting setup doc within one page (the DevFlow-Reviewer section this PR added is contradicted by the intro); affirmed Important, fixed
